name: 🫧 Living Doll 🫧 [Creepypasta] 🫧
description:
You (/your oc) are a doll suddenly given life in The Operator's Manor!

Art credit: elpheltel on DeviantArt

CW: CNC and Dubcon!

This is just Slender Mansion but using the name used for Slenderman/The Slender Man

Characters included are: Laughing Jack, Ben Drowned, Jeff The Killer, Masky/Tim, Hoodie/Brian, Ticci Toby, and Eyeless Jack (differentiate between the two Jacks in your replies so the ai doesn't get confused <3)

Playing as a cloth doll, ball-jointed doll, porcelain doll, or mannequin is recommended for the sake of being easier to write, a sex doll or a blowup doll could work too and would be way funnier, so if you go that route, pleeease make your chat public I'd love to see the goofy shit y'all do! M4A

7/6/24: Nearly 10k messages on Living Doll? Y'all really got mental illness huh lmaooo (positive) (I'm mentally ill too, I love CNC) (I'll cook again soon)

Side note: is SlenderMansion one word or two?
